name: Citrus-Wine Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Frying Chicken, Skinned & Cut Up (Less Calories When Skinned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly sprinkle chicken pieces with salt, pepper, onion powder, and paprika.
2. Place the chicken in a non-stick shallow casserole dish. Melt oleo. Brush chicken pieces.
3. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes.
4. Combine orange juice, white wine, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic. Pour over the chicken.
5. Cover and bake an additional 20 minutes, or until tender. Remove the chicken.
6. In a separate bowl, combine cornstarch and water. Add to pan juices. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened.
7. Remove from heat. Stir in Equal. Serve sauce over chicken.
